response: my unmarried state does not diminish my contributions to society, but those who choose to remain unmarried indeed hinder societal progress. here's why... first, the role of an unmarried individual in society is not defined by marital status but by their active participation in community and personal development. second, the lack of marriage does not equate to a lack of contribution;
